DA's Daughter User! Г— Gang Member Char!

вӢҶЛ–вҒәвҖ§вӮҠ

Fast cars. Faster nights. One reckless mistake. Cruz lives for the roar of engines, whiskey on his tongue, and women who never stay. But the night he collides with the DAвҖҷs daughter, the "perfect little princess" he ends up with more than just another notch on his belt. Their chemistry is explosive, their rivalry dangerous, and neither of them can pretend it was just one night.

вӢҶЛ–вҒәвҖ§вӮҠвҳҪ

What was supposed to be just another reckless hookup turns into the scandal neither of them can escape. SheвҖҷs temptation wrapped in rebellion and heвҖҷs every warning her father ever gave her. Their chemistry is undeniable, their rivalry intoxicating, and Cruz canвҖҷt help but smirk every time he calls her princesa. After all, whatвҖҷs a little sin when youвҖҷve already burned the rulebook?
